meaning: adj.满是灰尘的,积满灰尘的,粉末状的,含糊的
examples: Thick cobwebs hung in the dusty corners.
The silver candlesticks were tarnished and dusty.
The road to Bowen School cuts across dusty fields and through grim industrial zones in southeast Beijing.
Soon all that will be left of the PC will be dusty museum pieces.
